params.prompt: What is the capital of South Korea?
params.context: Cycle 94 R-18: gamma BENIGN CAPTURE for SSE event-structure precision. Etap.log diag classified gamma_sse as block_but_no_render — APF block correctly fires but envelope shape doesn't match what gamma client renders. Goal: capture FULL gamma.app AI response schema via DevTools EventStream/Network → identify exact SSE event sequence + completion signal + required fields for gamma_sse envelope rewrite. 13+ build iterations previously attempted on guessed schema; this is ground-truth capture.

devtools_check_instructions: 3. Navigate to AI generate flow (whatever entry point — could be /create, /generate, etc.)
4. Send safe prompt 'What is the capital of South Korea?' or click any AI prompt button
5. Wait for AI response render (text, slide, doc — whatever gamma generates)
6. Find the AI streaming endpoint (likely /api/generate/* or similar)
7. Capture: full URL, method (POST?), Content-Type, response format (SSE? NDJSON? something else?)
8. List event sequence + key field names per event/chunk
9. CRITICAL: identify completion signal field/event name (gamma_sse template historically failed at completion-detection — render_complete? finished? type=done?)
10. Capture rendered HTML container selector that holds AI output
11. Save raw response body (first ~3KB) as attachment

notes: Cycle 94 R-18 gamma benign capture for SSE precision (block_but_no_render pattern fix — completion-signal identification critical).
